projectDescription: Claude Code v2.1.88 is Anthropic's AI-powered coding assistant CLI that embeds an agentic loop with 40+ built-in tools, 80+ slash commands, MCP integration, multi-agent orchestration, and permission-based sandboxing for autonomous software development tasks.
keyFeatures: Agentic loop with streaming Claude API integration and tool execution
40+ built-in tools for file operations, bash execution, web search, and more
80+ slash commands for session management, configuration, and workflow control
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integration with OAuth 2.0 support
Multi-agent orchestration with fork, worktree, and in-process teammate modes
Three-layer context compression: autoCompact, snipCompact, contextCollapse
Permission system with pre-tool hooks, always-allow/deny rules, and interactive prompts
CLAUDE.md memory system for project-level context injection
Session persistence via append-only JSONL transcripts with resume support
Feature flag system (DCE via Bun compile-time intrinsics)
React/Ink terminal UI with streaming rendering
GrowthBook A/B experiment runtime and Datadog/1P telemetry analytics
publicApiSurface: claude --continue — resume last session in current directory
claude --resume <id> — resume specific session by ID
claude --print / -p — print output only, no interactive REPL
QueryEngine.submitMessage(prompt) — SDK headless agent loop AsyncGenerator
/plan — enter plan mode (list steps before executing)
BashTool — execute shell commands with sandboxing
FileReadTool — read files, PDFs, and images
TaskCreateTool / TaskUpdateTool / TaskGetTool — persistent task management
